title: Context Map Config
description: Diagram-specific settings for the context-map tool. Domain definitions and events live in ../config.yaml.

title.description: Diagram title shown in the browser tab.

layout.description: Top-left corner position of each domain box in the overview layout (px). Keys must match domain ids in ../config.yaml. Box dimensions are 220 × 105 px. The overview canvas is 1080 px wide.

x.description: Left edge of the domain box in pixels.

y.description: Top edge of the domain box in pixels.
